children.heading: USF
children.label: a USF
children.text: The Commission may not use funds from the universal service programs of the Commission established under , and the regulations issued under that section, to pay for any costs associated with this subchapter.section 254 of this title

children.heading: Other funds
children.label: b Other funds
children.text: The Commission may recover costs associated with this subchapter under to the extent provided for in an appropriation Act, as required under subsection (a) of that section.section 159 of this title
